cards.title: package.json not in version control
cards.body: Recent commits reference Next.js dev mode and Replit deployment, but package.json is missing from git. This breaks environment reproducibility and dependency auditing. Extract from the Replit IDE and commit it to establish a proper Node.js project structure.

cards.title: No CLAUDE.md project context
cards.body: This is an active, deployed project with minimal git tracking (1 source file). CLAUDE.md would clarify: Replit deployment process, feedback widget integration contract, how other projects consume this service. Essential for future contributors or session resumption.

cards.title: Zero test coverage on early-stage application
cards.body: No test files exist despite the project being deployed and serving a feedback widget. Establish at minimum a test directory structure and smoke test for the widget endpoint. Early project phase is the right time to bake in testing habits.

cards.title: No test coverage on financial spec validator
cards.body: 54 source files processing financial Excel documents with zero test coverage is unacceptable before productionization. Start with smoke tests for Excel parsing, spec validation rules, and error paths. Target 60%+ coverage on data-path code using Jest or Vitest.

cards.title: Changelog consolidation workflow broken (26-entry backlog)
cards.body: CHANGELOG-PENDING.md has 26 entries pending consolidation over 12 days. Per ~/.claude/rules/common/git-workflow.md, pre-commit hooks MUST enforce consolidation. Verify hooks are installed in .git/hooks and not being bypassed (--no-verify). If missing, reinstall and run consolidation immediately.

cards.title: Add test coverage
cards.body: 11 source files with zero tests creates ship risk for a user-facing release notes tool. Add jest/vitest suite focusing on critical paths (release rendering, data transforms, API integration). Aim for 60%+ coverage before next production deploy. No test files detected.

cards.title: Consolidate changelog backlog
cards.body: CHANGELOG-PENDING.md has 6 unpublished entries (12 days old) and violates your documentation-with-commits hooks. Consolidate into CHANGELOG.md and establish a weekly publish cadence to keep docs in sync.

cards.title: Add test coverage for spec reverse-engineering engine
cards.body: Eight source files exist but zero tests. The core spec parsing/transformation logic needs coverage before feature expansion. Write integration tests for form-to-spec conversion: start with happy path (valid form → valid spec output) and 2–3 error cases (malformed input, missing fields). This is the highest-risk area and will prevent silent bugs as others iterate on specs.

cards.title: No test coverage for cross-machine sync
cards.body: 42 source files manage critical developer configuration (Claude Code, VS Code, Git settings) with zero tests. A failed sync could silently corrupt settings on multiple machines. Add integration tests verifying: file integrity after sync, conflict detection, and rollback capability.

cards.title: Missing CLAUDE.md and validation rules
cards.body: All commits are automated syncs with no explicit conflict resolution or validation strategy. Create project CLAUDE.md documenting sync targets, validation rules, and rollback procedures. This prevents silent failures and guides future maintenance.

cards.title: Document 42-file config architecture
cards.body: Structure is inferred only from commit diffs. Add README mapping files to tools (Claude Code, VS Code, Git), document sync flow, and flag file dependencies. Future maintainers need this to understand impact and prevent partial syncs.

cards.title: Add Test Coverage for PPTX Generation and API Routes
cards.body: Zero tests across 6 source files. Core risk: presentation generation logic, password auth gate (added 2 days ago), and API routes lack automated validation. Regression testing is critical after recent auth changes. Start with Jest + API route tests targeting the presentation generation flow, then add component tests.

cards.title: Consolidate Stale Changelog Entries
cards.body: CHANGELOG-PENDING.md has 7 entries pending consolidation for 11 days. Per global hooks protocol, pre-commit should enforce this consolidation. Run consolidation immediately, then verify pre-commit hook configuration in settings.json to prevent future staleness.

cards.title: Commit pending onboarding materials (13 files)
cards.body: 13 file changes uncommitted for 3 days since last commit. Commit with clear message describing what was finalized (presentation, IBP demo, user guide updates). This ensures project state matches git history and enables easy rollback or reference if needed.

cards.title: Document onboarding materials with README
cards.body: Create README.md explaining: purpose of session, structure of materials (presentation vs. demo vs. guide), how stakeholders access/view content, any external dependencies. Critical for maintainability of presentation projects — enables others to find and use materials.

cards.title: No test coverage for 6 source files
cards.body: Express routes, WebSocket handlers, and session management have zero test coverage. This is a critical gap for a multi-session dashboard where session corruption or message loss would cause user data loss. Prioritize tests for session persistence, message routing, and import workflow.

cards.title: Scaffold Documentation Project Structure
cards.body: Project initialized but lacks any content or structure. Create CLAUDE.md defining scope and milestones, establish /docs/ directory layout (/api/, /architecture/, /integration/), and write a baseline TOC. This foundation is critical before authoring SDK and API reference content.

cards.title: Bootstrap project structure
cards.body: Package.json, tsconfig, ESLint, and Jest are undefined. Without these, no source code can be committed or tested. This is the blocker preventing development start. Create minimal package.json with Node runtime, TypeScript, linter, and test framework, then establish src/ and tests/ directories.

cards.title: Document project approach in CLAUDE.md
cards.body: 21K-star Zapier alternative with 280+ integrations needs clear development context: architecture (monorepo vs. modular?), integration SDK design, deployment strategy (Docker/Kubernetes?), and team workflow. CLAUDE.md should guide future contributors and maintain coherence as integrations scale.

cards.title: Zero test coverage for 36-file codebase in Building phase
cards.body: 36 source files with no tests is a critical risk for audit and compliance automation workflows—these are high-stakes domains where correctness and auditability are non-negotiable. Establish baseline unit tests for the agent specification layer and critical path logic immediately to prevent rework downstream.

cards.title: Test Coverage Crisis: 1% Coverage Across 93 Files
cards.body: Only 1 source file has tests out of 93 total. This violates the mandatory 80%+ test coverage rule and leaves the codebase vulnerable to regressions. Recent deployment fixes suggest high fragility. Start with critical paths: API data fetching, state management (hooks/context), and core dashboard components. Intermediate goal of 40% coverage would unlock safer feature development.

cards.title: 5 Uncommitted File Changes Block Clean State
cards.body: Working directory has 5 uncommitted changes. Per execution discipline rules, no half-finished implementations are allowed — either commit these as legitimate work or revert them. This is blocking proper state tracking and pre-commit hook validation (changelog consolidation depends on clean state).

cards.title: Build Configuration Accumulating Workarounds
cards.body: Recent commits reveal fragile deployment setup: React 19 peer dep conflicts (--legacy-peer-deps), cwd path issues (npm --prefix), Nix environment complexity, and NODE_ENV bypasses. Each workaround increases maintenance burden and deployment risk. Refactor to address root causes: resolve React 19 compatibility, standardize build container environment, simplify Node/npm setup.

cards.title: Zero test coverage on 94-file property scraper
cards.body: Critical gap: no tests covering scraping logic, financial filter validation, or auth. For a tool handling property listings and financial data, untested code creates regression and accuracy risks. Prioritize integration tests for core filters and scraper reliability.

cards.title: Stale changelog entries blocking release discipline
cards.body: CHANGELOG-PENDING.md has 2 unpublished entries from 29 days ago. Consolidate into CHANGELOG.md to resume changelog tracking discipline and unblock release readiness.

cards.title: Urgent: Establish test coverage for standup analysis modules
cards.body: Only 3 test files for 40 source files. The standup_blockers, standup_capacity, and standup_velocity generation functions have no visible test coverage, yet they directly feed sprint ceremony decisions and downstream systems. Add schema validation tests + mock Jira response tests to catch silent failures in data processing before metrics reach teams.

cards.title: Publish stale changelog entries (5-day backlog)
cards.body: CHANGELOG-PENDING.md contains 2 unpublished entries from 5 days ago while active feature development continues (feedback widget, auth, replit config). Consolidate into CHANGELOG.md and tag a release to keep deployment history accurate and ensure stakeholders see feature updates.

cards.title: Consolidate pending changelog
cards.body: CHANGELOG-PENDING.md contains 6 unpublished entries from 12 days ago. Per the post-commit-doc-cleanup hook enforcement rule in CLAUDE.md, these must be consolidated into CHANGELOG.md before any further commits or PR review. This is a process violation blocking release readiness.

cards.title: Add README documentation
cards.body: Yearly Reviews has no README. For a project focused on reviews and documentation, clarity on purpose, file structure, and usage is critical for collaborators. Add README with sections covering: project overview, setup instructions, file organization, and contribution workflow.

cards.title: Resolve pending changelog entries
cards.body: CHANGELOG-PENDING.md contains 6 unpublished entries from 12 days ago. User's documented pre-commit policy requires these to be consolidated into CHANGELOG.md before any commit. This suggests either the pre-commit hook is not running or was bypassed in recent commits. Consolidate now and verify hook is active.

cards.title: Clarify test strategy for UAT tool
cards.body: Project has 0 test files despite being a UAT testing tool. Either tests are managed elsewhere, the tool is documentation-only, or test coverage is incomplete. Add a brief note to .claude config or README explaining the testing approach.

cards.title: Publish changelog backlog (13 days, 20 entries)
cards.body: CHANGELOG-PENDING.md violates the pre-commit consolidation rule documented in hooks. Review the 20 entries, move them into CHANGELOG.md with dates, and delete the pending file. This restores workflow compliance and signals current project state to consumers.

cards.title: Add tests for scraper logic
cards.body: scripts/scrape-gnews.js is a live, production scraper feeding the command center but has zero tests. Add unit tests for cookie-based authentication vs. RSS fallback flows, and integration tests for output format stability. This catches regressions before they break the news feed.

cards.title: Wire pre-commit hooks into eod-sync automation
cards.body: Automated eod-sync commits are active (3 recent commits) but not triggering changelog consolidation. Either the automation is bypassing hooks (--no-verify) or hooks aren't configured in the automation context. Verify that automated commits respect the full pre-commit workflow.
